results.term: I'm concerned about my job. I have been out of wor...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I'm concerned about my job. I have been out of work for the past 5 weeks because I tested positive for COVID-19.

results.term: It just keeps getting better...  I applied for the...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: It just keeps getting better...  I applied for the Pandemic Unemployment Assistance and was approved.  The next day, I got an email asking me to verify my identity (I am fine with that.  It actually makes good sense.)...

results.term: So I did as instructed and got the message on the ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: So I did as instructed and got the message on the website thanking me for verification.  The following week I got a physical letter saying I was approved and the award amount per week.

results.term: I have gone online once a week and qualified, as o...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I have gone online once a week and qualified, as one is supposed to do, and still I have not received a cent.

results.term: Calling the customer service line is futile.  The ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Calling the customer service line is futile.  The computer just plays a recording that the agents are on other calls and then it disconnects the call.

results.term: I have been very fortunate.  People in my church h...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I have been very fortunate.  People in my church have been bringing me food.  I plan on trying to go to the food bank Monday, if they are open.

results.term: I actually got so tired of redialing the Departmen...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I actually got so tired of redialing the Department of Labor and Training that I sent an email to the Lieutenant Governor of the state asking for his assistance in getting the matter resolved.

results.term: I have been to this food bank once before, and the...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I have been to this food bank once before, and they actually made me feel very comfortable and welcomed and gave me an information package on other ways the parent organization may be able to assist me.

results.term: I am very lucky in that the organization is only 3...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I am very lucky in that the organization is only 3 miles from me.  I will be looking into their rent assistance and employment assistance programs as well.

results.term: I have an advantage because I have a professional ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I have an advantage because I have a professional background in cooking, so I can take random ingredients and turn them into wonderful and nutritious meals.  I just need to have the ingredients.

results.term: You are right.  I am definitely not going to sit a...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: You are right.  I am definitely not going to sit and pout.  I am just a bit frustrated with the system.

results.term: I am concerned that my boss may try to not take me...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I am concerned that my boss may try to not take me back at my job.  Because this is an "at will" state, he can terminate me without cause.  Although he can not legally fire me for being ill with COVID, he can take me back and simply release me the same day saying that I have become redundant.

results.term: I would not put it past him.  Sadly.  But I have t...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I would not put it past him.  Sadly.  But I have taken the attitude that if it does occur, there is nothing I can do to change the situation.  I would simply pursue a charge against him for wrongful termination, and seek a new job.

results.term: I may not win the suit, but I would definitely fil...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I may not win the suit, but I would definitely file one.  In 2000, I had an employer fire me without cause.  I sued and won that time.  Not only did they have to pay me back wages for the 90 days that the investigation took place, which was no minor sum,

results.term: they were found to be guilty, so the judge granted...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: they were found to be guilty, so the judge granted me my wages based on the average of 80 hour weeks I had been working, all my vacation time, plus the overtime I would have received, holiday pay, and then to put a nice bow on that gift, he awarded me 5000 dollars in damages because the old company lied and said I had broken the law.

results.term: My current employer actually knows this happened, ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: My current employer actually knows this happened, because years ago we discussed it, and I showed him the award letter from the Department of Labor and Training, itemizing the judge's findings and the awards.

results.term: Thank you for your time.  Have a great holiday.

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Thank you for your time.  Have a great holiday.
